{{Quote|Stars' end, you could hide an invasion force in here.|[[Rella]]|<ref name="Cloak of Deception">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Revenue''''' was a [[Lucrehulk-class LH-3210 cargo freighter/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class LH-3210 cargo freighter]] commanded by [[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay Dofine]].

==Characteristics==
The rest of the crew included a [[Unidentified Neimoidian navigator|Neimoidian navigator]], [[Unidentified Sullustan communications technician|Sullustan communications officer]], [[Unidentified Gran officer|Gran computer controller]], and [[Unidentified Ishi Tib assistant|Ishi Tib treasurer]]. The ship's complement of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|security droids]] included [[OLR-4]]. The freighter was defended by equatorially-mounted [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]].

==History==
It was loading tons of [[Lommite/Legends|Lommite]] ore at [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]] when it was attacked by the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Arwen Cohl]] in name of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]], a terrorist group fighting against the hold of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] on [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] worlds. In this attack, the freighter was destroyed and its pieces scattered throughout Dorvalla space.

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
